problem id: fba1e3c2
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND SHL(6)

examples:
  00101000 -> 00000000
  10110101 -> 01000000
  10111101 -> 01000000
  01000010 -> 00000000
  01111111 -> 11000000
  10011111 -> 11000000
  11010010 -> 00000000
  00110100 -> 00000000
  11110000 -> 00000000

query: 11000000
predicted answer: 00000000
